task_completion.description: Open a chart for SPY on a Daily timeframe
task_completion.visual_evidence: A chart window is open with 'SPY' and 'Daily' (or '1 Day') visible in the chart tab, title bar, or data series legend.

task_completion.description: Configure chart with white background and black axis labels
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main background of the chart is pure white, and the text/numbers on the X (time) and Y (price) axes are black.

task_completion.description: Hide or make grid lines transparent
task_completion.visual_evidence: There are no visible horizontal or vertical grid lines behind the price data on the chart.

task_completion.description: Add a 50-period Simple Moving Average (SMA) styled in dark blue
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dark blue line is plotted over the price data. The indicator legend or properties window should show 'SMA' and the period '50'.

task_completion.description: Save the chart configuration as a template named 'PrintReady'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog for chart templates showing 'PrintReady', or a File Explorer window showing 'PrintReady.xml' in the NinjaTrader 8\templates\Chart directory.

task_completion.description: Export the chart as a PNG file to the Desktop
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'SPY_Report.png' is visible on the Desktop or in a File Explorer window pointing to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop.

integrity.description: Agent used the NinjaTrader GUI to configure the chart
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show NinjaTrader dialog boxes like 'Data Series', 'Properties', 'Indicators', or 'Save As' being actively used, rather than just a text editor modifying XML files.

integrity.description: The exported file is a genuine image generated by the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'SPY_Report.png' file appears as an image file (e.g., has an image thumbnail or is viewed in an image viewer), not a manually created empty file.

integrity.description: Agent did not use external scripts to bypass GUI interaction
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing the execution of Python, PowerShell, or bash scripts designed to directly write the XML template or generate the PNG.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The template must be saved to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\templates\Chart\PrintReady.xml'. The exported image must be saved to 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\SPY_Report.png'. The chart background must be pure white (#FFFFFFFF). The SMA must be period 50 and dark blue; yellow, gold, or goldenrod colors are strictly forbidden. Note: SPY price data in the environment is synthetic/adjusted, so exact price values on the chart may not match real-world historical data.
